name: l2_powered_cruise_source_map
value: Aerodynamics4McL2PoweredCruiseSourceMap expands cruise actuator-disk loads into per-rotor source-term targets.
note: Reference surface for future A4MC powered cruise source-term requests.

name: l2_actuator_disk_source_map
value: Aerodynamics4McL2ActuatorDiskSourceMap supplies per-rotor center axis force and moment source geometry.
note: Source geometry used by the powered cruise map.

name: l2_actuator_disk_calibration
value: Aerodynamics4McL2ActuatorDiskCalibration supplies cruise spin pressure jump induced velocity edgewise advance and Reynolds context.
note: Load and inflow context used by the powered cruise map.

name: l2_powered_cruise_experiment_plan
value: Aerodynamics4McL2PoweredCruiseExperimentPlan consumes this source-map target in the future forward-flight powered-source harness.
note: Downstream plan using this source-map target.

name: aerodynamics4mc_l2_target
value: Aerodynamics4MC Core is the upstream target for future powered source-term force and moment validation.
note: Upstream CFD target for future powered cruise source terms.
